checks.detail: missing=['Independent real-robot or accepted high-fidelity external validation evidence', 'External rollout metrics recomputed from raw JSONL logs', 'Manifest-declared real task configs replace non-evidence templates', 'Manifest-declared independent non-oracle baseline evidence and fairness contract']
checks.name: gap_audit_has_four_external_blockers

checks.detail: Probe the selected external platform machine Probe ManiSkill task-family bindings Onboard the public simulator platform Select a non-template backend module Use the backend integration packet as the public-simulator backend checklist Create real manifest-declared task configs Use the config manifest packet as the task-config evidence checklist Use the rollout evidence packet as the raw-log evidence checklist Fill platform fidelity acceptance with real provenance Run a quarantined first-panel backend smoke test Use the fidelity provenance packet as the platform acceptance checklist Unseal method aliases only after configs, implementations, and run plan are frozen Use a specific immutable external run id Replace scaffold-only methods with real non-oracle implementations or wrappers Use the method implementation packet as the non-oracle work-order checklist Collect paired-reset external rollouts Build the real manifest and hash-lock release artifacts Recompute external metrics from raw JSONL logs Audit independent method evidence after the manifest is real Run the final strict external-evidence gate
checks.name: operator_actions_cover_collection_blockers

collection_blockers: backend_module_ready: --backend-module is required before actual collection

missing_requirements.blocker: strict external evidence audit is NOT_READY; real manifest/log/video/checkpoint evidence and accepted robot/simulator fidelity provenance are missing
missing_requirements.requirement: Independent real-robot or accepted high-fidelity external validation evidence

missing_requirements.blocker: strict rollout validation does not pass because external_validation/manifest.json and raw logs are missing
missing_requirements.requirement: External rollout metrics recomputed from raw JSONL logs

missing_requirements.blocker: strict config evidence audit has no real manifest-declared configs
missing_requirements.requirement: Manifest-declared real task configs replace non-evidence templates

missing_requirements.blocker: baseline contract still reports manifest-declared independent non-oracle evidence as missing; strict adapter contract evidence audit has no passing manifest-declared real implementations
missing_requirements.requirement: Manifest-declared independent non-oracle baseline evidence and fairness contract
